message:
fix(core): tighten connection close and add hot-path early-outs

Several independent stability and performance fixes to
`fsqlite-core::connection` that were found while exercising the realdb
benchmark matrix and the transaction lifecycle tests:

1. `close_in_place` now distinguishes `:memory:` connections from
   file-backed databases when finalizing parked write transactions. For
   a memory database the entire database is about to be torn down, so
   committing a cached or retained autocommit writer is pure wasted work
   — we rollback cheaply instead. For file-backed databases we keep the
   existing commit path and, critically, now propagate commit errors
   from both the cached writer and the retained autocommit path when
   `best_effort` is false, rather than silently swallowing them on the
   cached path. A new regression test
   `test_close_in_place_releases_memory_parked_write_transactions`
   verifies both the retained-batch and non-retained (cached writer)
   memory close scenarios.

2. `finalize_live_vtab_registry_commit` and
   `live_vtab_commit_all_best_effort` now early-return when there is no
   live virtual-table state to reconcile. These helpers were showing up
   on the hot path for workloads that never touch a live vtab because
   they still acquired multiple RefCell borrows on every commit.

3. `maybe_gc_tick` now early-returns before touching the GC clock when
   `gc_todo` is empty. The GC clock advancement was previously running
   on every VDBE opcode boundary even for workloads that never queue GC
   work.

4. Prepared direct-insert append hint caching is now aware of
   `:memory:` autocommit: for memory databases in autocommit we retain
   the rightmost leaf page image across statement boundaries, which
   lets the next append reuse the cached leaf instead of walking back
   through `cursor.last()`. A new helper
   `prepare_prepared_direct_insert_cached_leaf_hint` centralizes the
   "retain full hint vs. retain only metadata" decision so both the
   hot-path insert and the fallback `table_cached_rightmost_leaf_hint`
   lookup make the same choice. The corresponding expectation in
   `pager_routing_tests` was updated from "park only metadata" to
   "retain full leaf image" for the memory autocommit case.
